---
title: "\'Cumberland Street Children\'s Hospital, The\'"
---

## \'Cumberland Street Children\'s Hospital, The\'

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1871
**Genre:** Non-fiction
**Format:** Article in Journal

**Publisher:** <i>MP</i> (January 1871) 92-96

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
